title: Controller redundancy for a display system
abstract: A display system comprises a plurality of displays each comprising an array of light-emitting elements to display a corresponding message, a primary controller that controls the array of light-emitting elements of each display to control the content of each message, a communication network to transmit control signals from the primary controller to the displays, a remote manager in communication with the primary controller via a primary manager communication link, and a redundant controller configured and able to control the array of light-emitting elements of each display to control the content of each message if it is determined that there is a malfunction of the primary controller, an interruption in the communication network between the primary controller and at least one of the displays, or an interruption in the primary communication link.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS  What is claimed is: 1. A display system comprising: a plurality of displays each comprising a plurality of light-emitting elements arranged in an array to display a corresponding message comprising one or more of textual, graphical, or video information; a primary controller that controls the array of light-emitting elements of each of the plurality of display to control the content of the corresponding message of each of the plurality of displays; a communication network between the primary controller and the plurality of displays to transmit one or more control signals from the primary controller to each of the plurality of displays; a remote manager in communication with the primary controller via a primary manager communication link; and a redundant controller configured and able to control the array of light-emitting elements of each of the plurality of displays to control the content of the corresponding message of each of the plurality of displays if it is determined that there is at least one of: a malfunction of the primary controller, an interruption in the communication network between the primary controller and at least one of the plurality of displays, or an interruption in the primary communication link. 2. The display system according to claim 1 , wherein the redundant controller is in communication with the plurality of displays via the communication network, wherein the communication network transmits one or more control signals from the redundant controller to each of the plurality of displays if the redundant controller is in control of the plurality of display modules. 3. The display system according to claim 1 , wherein the primary controller connects to the communication network via a primary display communication link and the redundant controller connects to the communication network via a redundant display communication link. 4. The display system according to claim 1 , further comprising a redundant communication network between the redundant controller and the plurality of displays to transmit one or more control signals from the redundant controller to each of the plurality of displays if the redundant controller is in control of the plurality of display modules. 5. The display system according to any one of claims 1-4, wherein the redundant controller is in communication with the remote manager via a redundant manager communication link. 6. The display system according to any one of claims 1-5, wherein the primary controller and the redundant controller are in communication via a controller bridge link. 7. The display system according to any one of claims 1-6, wherein the remote manager is configured to monitor one or more of the primary controller, the communication network, the plurality of displays, or the primary manager communication link and make a determination if the malfunction of the primary controller, the interruption in the communication network between the primary controller and at least one of the plurality of displays, or the interruption in the primary communication link has occurred. 8. The display system according to claim 7, wherein, upon making the determination, the remote manager instructs the redundant manager to take control of the plurality of displays. 9. The display system according to any one of claims 1-8, further comprising a diagnostic monitor to monitor one or more of the primary controller, the communication network, the plurality of displays, or the primary manager communication link and make a determination if the malfunction of the primary controller, the interruption in the communication network between the primary controller and at least one of the plurality of displays, or the interruption in the primary communication link has occurred. 10. The display system according to claim 9, wherein, upon making the determination, the diagnostic monitor or the remote manager instructs the redundant manager to take control of the plurality of displays. 11. The display system according to any one of claims 1-10, wherein the redundant controller is configured to monitor one or more of the primary controller, the communication network, the plurality of displays, or the primary manager communication link and make a determination if the malfunction of the primary controller, the interruption in the communication network between the primary controller and at least one of the plurality of displays, or the interruption in the primary communication link has occurred. 12. The display system according to claim 11 , wherein, upon making the determination, the redundant manager takes control of the plurality of displays. 13. The display system according to any one of claims 1-12, wherein the remote manager, the primary controller, and the plurality of displays are configured so that the textual, graphical, or video information of the corresponding message of each of the plurality of displays includes transportation information. 14. The display system according to claim 13, wherein plurality of displays comprise a plurality of dynamic road signs. 15. The display system according to claim 13 or claim 14, wherein the remote manager, the primary controller, and the primary manager communication link are configured to transmit signals corresponding to the transportation information according to the National Transportation Communication for ITS (Intelligent Transportation Systems] Protocol (NTCIP) standard. 16. The display system according to claim 15, wherein the redundant controller is in communication with the remote manager via a redundant manager communication link, and wherein the redundant controller and the redundant communication link are configured to transmit signals corresponding to the transportation information according to the National Transportation Communication for ITS (Intelligent Transportation Systems] Protocol (NTCIP) standard. 17. The display system according to any one of claims 13-16, wherein the primary controller, the plurality of displays, and the communication network are configured to transmit signals corresponding to the transportation information according to the National Transportation Communication for ITS (Intelligent Transportation Systems] Protocol (NTCIP) standard. 18. The display system according to claim 17, wherein the redundant controller is in communication with the plurality of displays via the communication network, and wherein the redundant controller is configured to transmit signals corresponding to the transportation information according to the National Transportation Communication for ITS (Intelligent Transportation Systems] Protocol (NTCIP) standard. 19. The display system according to claim 17, further comprising a redundant communication network between the redundant controller and the plurality of displays to transmit one or more control signals from the redundant controller to each of the plurality of displays if the redundant controller is in control of the plurality of display modules, wherein 

 the redundant controller and the redundant communication network are configured to transmit signals corresponding to the transportation information according to the National Transportation Communication for ITS (Intelligent Transportation Systems] Protocol (NTCIP) standard.
